layman_headline: Extreme fear grips crypto — no clean setups yet, but ETH is getting closer to a buy zone.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory with a score of 25/100 and worsening. Bitcoin is holding around $64K but altcoins are getting hammered across the board. Most of the coins on our watchlist are in confirmed downtrends with bearish chart patterns. Ethereum has an RSI approaching oversold and some signs of stabilization, but hasn't quite reached a level where the risk-reward justifies jumping in. We're staying patient and waiting for a better entry.
layman_action: Do nothing right now. Keep cash ready. If Ethereum drops to around $1,800 with signs of buying volume picking up, that could be the entry point. Don't chase anything in this fearful market.
expert_reasoning: Reviewing all 9 swing candidates, none present a high-conviction setup right now. BONK has an RSI near 31 but its chart is strongly bearish (-2.0) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu patterns — classic falling knife. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +18.4% in 7 days means it's already extended with poor risk/reward (0.38x). DEXE is overbought at RSI 71. ETH is the most attractive with RSI 39 approaching oversold, but below all major MAs with a -0.70 chart bias and only 1.41x risk/reward at current levels. BTC dominance at 56.4% is hostile to alts. The prudent move is to wait for ETH to test $1,800 support where risk/reward improves significantly.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening — sentiment could deteriorate further causing more selling
BTC dominance at 56.4% continues to squeeze alts, and no sign of reversal
No MACD cross confirmations or volume breakout signals on any candidate — setups are incomplete
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with rising volume would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index — a turn from 25 toward 30+ would signal sentiment bottoming
FTX $900M distribution timeline — creditor payouts could inject significant buying pressure into ETH and SOL
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100, worsening) with BTC holding near $64K while alts bleed. High BTC dominance at 56.4% signals capital rotation away from altcoins — a hostile environment for swing trades on smaller tokens.
context_banner: Extreme Fear regime with high BTC dominance — disciplined patience is the edge right now.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 25 (Extreme Fear) and worsening from 27 yesterday — no capitulation bottom confirmed yet, staying defensive.
ETH RSI at 39.4 approaching oversold territory — our highest-confidence indicator (80% win rate) but not yet at the 30 trigger level.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors in fifth payment round — potential buying catalyst for major tokens like ETH and SOL once funds are received.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests overleveraged positions are being flushed — could create a cleaner setup for a bounce once complete.
All candidates except LDO and DEXE show bearish chart structures. LDO has Three White Soldiers but is already extended (+18.4% in 7d) with poor 0.38x R/R.
